places.name: Grand Canyon
places.mission: Sketch rock layers and invent a safe hiking plan.
facts: The Grand Canyon is in Arizona, United States.
The Colorado River helped carve it over a very long time.

places.name: Amazon Rainforest
facts: The Amazon spans several South American countries.
Rainforests are home to many plants, animals, and fungi.

places.name: Cairo
places.mission: Build a pyramid from blocks and test stable shapes.
facts: Cairo is the capital of Egypt.
The Nile River has supported communities for thousands of years.

places.name: Tokyo
places.mission: Design a transit map for a busy city.
facts: Tokyo is the capital of Japan.
Large cities use trains, maps, and planning to help people move.
